title: Ubiquiti UAP-FlexHD - UniFi FlexHD
description: The small, elegant yet powerful AP is ideal for businesses and homes. Modern and discreet design allows for placement close to users for optimal performance. In the 5GHz band, it reaches a transmission speed of up to 1.733 Gbit/s and in 2.4GHz 300 Mbps . The access point is suitable for indoor and outdoor use . Seamless integration and management with the UniFi network solution You need to download the original software called UniFi controller from the official website, thanks to which the entire network can be controlled. The indisputable advantage of the UniFi controller is that it is completely free without any restrictions ! This central management will allow you to upload maps and set basic parameters such as SSID, guest account, start page, traffic statistics and the list and status of associated clients always easily and quickly Zero Handoff Roaming - uninterrupted transition between individual APs Wireless uplink (suitable where it is impossible to get a data cable) Up to 8 SSIDs Detailed traffic statistics Guest network Load balance - maintaining an even load / switching clients Speed limiting for each SSID Device Holders - wall, column, table Straps Gigabit PoE power injector 48V / 0.32A Power cord Screws
specsSearch: Wireless features Wireless frequency 2.4 + 5 GHz (dual band) WiFi standards 802.11ac, 802.11ac - wave2, 802.11n, 802.11a, 802.11b/g MU-MIMO Yes Transmission speed - 5GHz [Mb/s] 1733 Transmission speed - 2.4GHz [Mb/s] 300 Tx power 2.4GHz [dBm] 23 Tx power 5GHz [dBm] 26 Security WEP, WPA-PSK, WPA-Enterprise (WPA/WPA2, TKIP/AES) 2.4GHz MIMO 2 x 2 5GHz MIMO 4 x 4 Type of antenna Built-in Internal antennas 4 Roaming Yes Antenna gain [dBi] 4 Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (1) 10/100/1000Mbps Gigabit LAN Yes Power Power over Ethernet 802.3af, 44 .. 57V DC PoE type PoE-In (only) Max. power consumption [W] 10,5 Physical characteristics Purpose Outdoor Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 30 up to 70 Weight [g] 315 Width [mm] 49 Height [mm] 159 Depth [mm] 49
